display.purpose: Hero h1 only. One per page.

body.purpose: Prose. Max 65ch. text-wrap: pretty on long passages.

label.purpose: Metadata only: location, stat captions, filter text, tags.

motion.name: filter-swap
motion.value: opacity 0→1, scale 0.97→1, 200ms easeOut via AnimatePresence popLayout

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — Work with me, contact, primary conversion actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #A0522D; color: #fff; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 1px 8px rgba(160,82,45,0.30); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8B3D1F; box-shadow: 0 2px 14px rgba(160,82,45,0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #A0522D; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions — Case Studies, LinkedIn, GitHub.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: rgba(36,22,12,0.65); padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(160,82,45,0.25); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #FDF1EC; color: rgba(36,22,12,1); border-color: rgba(160,82,45,0.45); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #A0522D; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip — Active
components.css: .ds-chip-active { background: #A0522D; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #A0522D; font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Filter Chip — Inactive
components.css: .ds-chip-inactive { background: transparent; color: rgba(36,22,12,0.55); padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #DFCFC6; font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-chip-inactive:hover { border-color: rgba(160,82,45,0.30); color: rgba(36,22,12,0.80); }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Standard project card — title, description, tags.
components.html:
Multi-Agent Pipeline
AI-powered content automation for enterprise workflows.
Claude CodePython
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #DFCFC6; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(160,82,45,0.30); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #231409; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(35,20,9,0.70); line-height: 1.6; } .ds-card-tags { display: flex; gap: 0.375rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-tag { background: #FDF1EC; border: 1px solid #F7DDD1; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; color: #7A6055; }

components.name: Featured Project Card
components.description: highlight:true card — spans full grid width, terracotta tint background.
components.html:
AI Quote Assistant
featured
End-to-end quote generation pipeline with multi-agent QC.
components.css: .ds-card-featured { background: #FDF1EC; border: 1px solid rgba(160,82,45,0.35); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.75rem; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card-featured:hover { border-color: rgba(160,82,45,0.55); } .ds-featured-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-badge { background: #F7DDD1; color: #6E2B10; border: 1px solid #EBBCA8; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav with backdrop blur. Active state on full-route links only.
components.html:
Tim Lok
ProjectsCVContact
components.css: .ds-nav { border-bottom: 1px solid #DFCFC6; position: sticky; top: 0; background: rgba(248,245,242,0.80); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); z-index: 10; } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; height: 3.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-nav-brand { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #231409; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(35,20,9,0.45); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link--active { color: #231409; }

narrative.overview:
A light, warm workspace where evidence surfaces with human warmth. Think a well-used notebook on a workbench — clay and terracotta accents on a clean, off-white ground, the craft of someone who builds things for real. The atmosphere is calm authority, not hype. The background supports the work; the work carries the weight.

The clay accent is the primary signal frequency. It appears where interaction lives and is never decorative. A subtle terracotta atmospheric gradient at the viewport corners gives spatial warmth without competing with content.

The typographic voice is Bricolage Grotesque — a humanist-influenced variable grotesque whose name literally means assemblage, DIY work. System monospace handles metadata labels: a craft signal without an extra font load.
keyCharacteristics: Light-native — warm light IS the identity, not a toggle
Single-accent system: Sienna Clay for interaction, Terracotta Tint for featured surface
Atmospheric depth via fixed viewport clay wash at 5–7% opacity
Bricolage Grotesque for display and body; system mono for metadata only
Flat-by-default surfaces; hover state is border color shift, never elevation

rules.name: The Clay Lock Rule
rules.body: Sienna Clay is reserved for interactive surfaces. Dark Rust (clay-600) is the stat-block data color only. Clay on a static, non-interactive element is drift.

rules.name: The Background Restraint Rule
rules.body: Body background chroma stays ≤ 0.006. Above that it reads as cream — the 2026 AI-default trap.

rules.name: The Mono Discipline Rule
rules.body: System mono appears only on metadata. All other secondary text uses Bricolage Grotesque at lighter weight or lower opacity.

rules.name: The One H1 Rule
rules.body: One display-size heading per page. Section h2 headings are small by design — they orient, not shout.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat. Hover state is border color shift only. A glowing card communicates false affordance.

dos: Use Sienna Clay as the only interactive signal
Use Dark Rust (clay-600) exclusively for hero stat values
Use system mono exclusively for metadata
Keep body::before gradient fixed and unscrolled
Use design tokens — never hardcode border-white/10 or bg-white/5
Pair every animation with prefers-reduced-motion respect
Keep body text at minimum text-foreground/70 or text-muted-foreground for WCAG AA
donts: Don't make this look like a dark SaaS portfolio
Don't use border-white/10, bg-white/5, or any white opacity hack on the light theme
Don't add warm tint to background beyond oklch(0.97 0.004 50)
Don't use border-left/right > 1px as a colored stripe accent
Don't add eyebrow labels above every section heading
Don't replicate the stat block pattern on other sections
Don't use Space Grotesk, DM Sans, or DM Mono — they are retired
